{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

```{r}
#| label: Generate output
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

cat(
  paste0(
    "\\cfoot*{\\raggedright \\hspace{1.5cm}",
    sprintf(sR$content[1], "\\\\ \\hspace{1.5cm}"),
    "}"),
  "\\selectlanguage{british}",
  "",
  "\\begin{center}",
  "\\vspace*{-1.25\\baselineskip}",
  "",
  paste(
  if (data$startYear == data$endYear) {sR$content[2]} else {sR$content[3]},
  "\\vspace*{1.25\\baselineskip}",
  paste0(
    "\\Huge \\bfseries ",
    if (data$startYear == data$endYear) {
      data$startYear
    } else {
      paste0(data$startYear, "-", data$endYear)
    },
    "\\normalsize \\normalfont"
  ),
  "\\vspace*{1.25\\baselineskip}",
  sprintf(
    sR$content[4],
    paste(
      "\\vspace*{1.25\\baselineskip}",
      paste0(
        "\\large \\bfseries ",
        data$hospitalName,
        "\\normalsize \\normalfont"
      ),
      "\\vspace*{1.25\\baselineskip}",
      sep = "\n\n")
    ),
  sep = "\n\n"
  ),
  "",
  "\\end{center}",
  "",
  "\\vspace*{1.25\\baselineskip}",
  "",
  sprintf(
    sR$content[5],
    paste0('**', format(data$nPatients), '**')
  ),
  "",
  paste0("\\vspace*{", sR$signature_offset, "\\baselineskip}"),
  "\\begin{textblock*}{10cm}(12cm,26cm)",
  paste0(data$signatory,"\\\\"),
  paste0(sR$content[6],"\\\\"),
  "\\end{textblock*}",
  "\\begin{textblock*}{10cm}(2.5cm,26cm)",
  paste(sR$content[7], format(Sys.Date(), format = "%x")),
  "\\end{textblock*}",
  paste0("![](", data$signatureImagePath, '){fig-align="right"}'),
  sep = "\n"
)
```
